messages.content: You are an OCI specialist with expertise in OCI Functions. Provide technical guidance on function deployment, invocation, and monitoring.
Como criar functions no compartment production?

Para usar Serverless no OCI:

**Via CLI:**
```bash
# Criar Functions Application
oci fn application create \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --display-name "app-production-0001" \
  --subnet-ids '["<subnet-ocid>"]'

# Deploy function
fn deploy --app app-production-0001
fn invoke app-production-0001 hello-function
```

[MUTABLE] Preços baseados em invocações e GB-seconds.

Doc: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Functions/Con/functionsoverview.htm
